notes: agent_mode_setup.rs:19 SPEEDBUMP_HEADER is an inline banner dialog title rendered to UI -> translate (interrogative, full-width ？); brand Warp preserved. warpify/render.rs:185 'Never Warpify this host' is a clickable link label rendered via ui_builder().link() -> translate, brand Warpify preserved. docker.rs:72 'NAME_REGEX should be valid.' is a Regex::new(...).expect(...) literal -> panic_message. argument_editor.rs:829 'Add environment variables' is a button with_centered_text_label -> translate (imperative button label, no trailing punct). naive.rs:21 'Chunks must have at least one element' is chunk.last().expect(...) -> panic_message. find.rs:325 'Couldn't advance to next state' is anyhow .context(...) on DFA state stepping; pure internal error-chain diagnostic that flows to error/log sinks, never UI -> telemetry_payload. search.rs:241 'Must have search results' is .expect(...) -> panic_message. manager.rs:1857 'Remote server returned an empty GetDiffStateResponse' (line-continuation literal) flows into log::warn! sink -> telemetry_payload. paths.rs:173 'Library/Application Support' is a filesystem path component passed to .join() -> not UI, identifier/path -> protocol_key. wgpu/mod.rs:77 'Failed to send lock acquired signal' is tx.send(...).expect(...) -> panic_message. clipped.rs:57 'Clipped element should have a size at time of paint' is .expect(...) -> panic_message. viewported_list.rs:417 'Child should exist at paint time' is .expect(...) -> panic_message.
